title: Deconstruct Screen Reader Heuristics
description: Analyze how common screen readers (VoiceOver, JAWS, NVDA) interpret semantic HTML structures. Implement "Visually Hidden" techniques to provide non-visual context without altering visual layout.
objectives: Analyze how common screen readers (VoiceOver, JAWS, NVDA) interpret semantic HTML structures.
Implement "Visually Hidden" techniques to provide non-visual context without altering visual layout.
